title: lycopodium tenellum
intro: Lycopodium tenellum, also known as dwarf club moss or small club moss, is a type of small evergreen plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceous family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of glycosides, terpenes, and other compounds. Lycopodium tenellum is said to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lycopodium tenellum is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used as a component in some homeopathic remedies.
